---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement for the module
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem / use case

What are you trying to accomplish that the module does not support today?

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you would like to happen, including new variables or
outputs if relevant.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you have considered.

## Additional context

Anything else that would help us evaluate the request.
